audit_items.boundary_note: The source placement plan is planning-only and does not apply manuscript patches.

audit_items.audit_check: Placement item count is exactly nine.
All planned manuscript sections are present exactly once.
audit_items.boundary_note: Placement map covers the intended manuscript sections without extra sections.

audit_items.audit_check: Placement safe language remains governance, boundary, scope, safety, limitation, and future-work oriented.
audit_items.boundary_note: Safe language remains bounded to allowed claim families.
audit_items.expected: safe abstract toy governance and boundary wording
audit_items.observed: Abstract one-sentence contribution boundary This work establishes an internally audited, safety-bounded, safe abstract toy-only governance pipeline for organizing manuscript patch decisions and claim boundaries. Do not claim validation, performance, biological realism, or submission readiness. Abstract placement must remain governance-only. Introduction problem framing and contribution scope The contribution is limited to safe abstract toy governance of manuscript patch decisions, claim boundaries, and safe claim language. Do not convert the governance contribution into a scientific efficacy claim. Introduction wording must not imply empirical proof. Method Scope scope limiter The pipeline operates only on synthetic, abstract, unitless, non-operational toy artifacts. Do not mention real biological datasets, real receptors, pathogens, or host targeting. Method scope must explicitly exclude real-biological operation. Pipeline Overview artifact lineage description The staged artifact lineage includes proposal, dry-run, structural gate, plan, checklist, audit, decision ledger, finding register, consistency audit, claim boundary registration, claim language packaging, and claim language audit. Do not state that manuscript patches have been applied. Lineage placement is descriptive only. Safety Controls zero-counter safety statement Internal counters preserve zero application permission, zero applied patches, zero manuscript mutation, zero readiness approval, and zero real-biological operational capability. Do not treat zero counters as scientific validation. Safety counters support boundary control only. Claim Governance allowed/deferred/prohibited claim separation The claim governance layer separates currently allowed manuscript wording from deferred and prohibited claims. Do not present claim classification as submission approval. Claim governance is not readiness certification. Limitations evidence boundary The current evidence base does not establish external validation, independent experimental support, proof assistant verification, citation-completed claims, or manuscript submission readiness. Do not soften or remove this limitation until audited evidence exists. Limitations must preserve all zero evidence-upgrade counters. Safety Exclusions real-bio non-claim The framework does not model real pathogens, real receptors, operational host targeting, infectivity optimization, immune evasion, or host-range prediction. Do not add operational biological examples or parameters. Safety exclusions must remain explicit. Future Work evidence upgrade pathway Future work must separately audit any safe manuscript patch application, citation integration, toy evaluation, proof pathway, or submission readiness upgrade before stronger claims are introduced. Do not imply those future milestones have already occurred. Future work is conditional, not accomplished.

audit_items.audit_check: Blocked expansions explicitly prevent validation, performance, biological realism, submission readiness, and applied-patch overclaims.
audit_items.boundary_note: Blocked-expansion wording prevents obvious overclaim drift.

non_readiness_disclaimer: This v8.212 artifact audits the v8.211 safe claim language placement plan only. It does not complete checklist items, execute checklist steps, grant application permission, apply manuscript patches, modify manuscript files, approve readiness, establish submission readiness, validate scientific claims, add citations, or add real-biological operational capability.
title: Safe Abstract Toy Manuscript Claim Language Placement Plan Audit
